Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-13 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
Today's momentum-ranker-long dashboard shows two extraordinarily strong performers leading the 700+ ticker universe. AGX ranks #1 with a perfect score of 96.5, driven by explosive multi-year returns (2023.66% over 10 years, 1332.39% over 5 years) and all five momentum ratio thresholds passing, while maintaining all four moving average supports. LINC follows as the second entry with similarly staggering long-term performance (2581.44% over 10 years) despite a weaker 1-year return of 144% versus AGX's 321.97%, indicating a recovery or late-cycle acceleration. Both securities are flagged as "strong_buy" with momentum signals in the clean range, and both dramatically outpace SPY and QQQ over extended periods—AGX by 1761.57% and 1443.31% over 10 years respectively. The only note of caution appears in volatility: AGX shows "thin" vol conditions with a 0.736 vol_ratio, suggesting lower-than-normal trading volume despite the strong technical setup.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
